creator: yuripv@FreeBSD.org
text:
It's possible that it's related to ipmb change, some questions here though:
- is there any specific ipmitool that triggers the issue or just running `ipmitool sensor get "PS 1 Output"` continuously?
- did ipmitool version change as well? (if yes, does the older one trigger the issue on 13.2 as well?)
- are the "Get PICMG/VSO" errors logged in the "OK" case as well ? (second one includes -v)
- is there anything related in the iLO log?
